Short CV

Emel Erdeniz was born in Bursa in 1991. She graduated from Istanbul University Florence Nightingale Faculty of Nursing in 2015. He has 2 years of clinical experience in Acıbadem Maslak Hospital Cardiovascular Surgery Service and Bursa Acıbadem Hospital General Intensive Care Unit. In 2018, she completed the Üsküdar University Health Sciences Institute Psychiatric Nursing Program in 2020. She has been continuing her doctorate program in Hacettepe University Health Sciences Institute Psychiatric Nursing Program since 2021. She has been working as a Research Assistant at Üsküdar University, Faculty of Health Sciences, Department of Nursing since 2021.
